This `FrameLayout` layout or its `LinearLayout` parent is unnecessary
Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `ApiRepository` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
If you plan to use data binding in a Kotlin project, you should apply the kotlin-kapt plugin.
BOM should be added with a call to platform()

Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/logo.png` in densityless folder

The image `ic_launcher.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi\ic_launcher.png: 560x560 dp (840x840 px), mipmap-mdpi\ic_launcher.png: 840x840 dp (840x840 px), mipmap-xhdpi\ic_launcher.png: 420x420 dp (840x840 px), mipmap-xxhdpi\ic_launcher.png: 280x280 dp (840x840 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi\ic_launcher.png: 210x210 dp (840x840 px)
The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: logo.png, ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher.png
